metaData.Key Information: Lays Potato Chips American Style Cream & Onion Flavour Relish the delectable combination of sour and cream perfectly blended with herb and onion flavour. From the everyday snack to the impromptu get-togethers, LAYS chips are the perfect addition to any occasion. Whether its About the brand- Lays, the worlds largest and favourite snack food brand has steadily established itself as an indispensable part of Indias snacking culture since its launch in 1995. With its irresistible taste, international and Indian flavours, Lays has established itself as a youth brand and continues to grow in the hearts and minds of its consumers. Lays is made with Indias best-quality fresh potatoes, simply sliced and cooked in edible vegetable oils, and then seasoned with delicious flavours

- Crafted with Premium Galician Potatoes, Olive Oil, and Sea Salt.
- Made with carefully selected Galician potatoes, fried in high-quality olive oil, and lightly seasoned with sea salt for an authentic, gourmet flavour experience.
- Bringing a taste of Spain to your home, Bonilla a la Vista chips are crafted with traditional Spanish ingredients and methods, capturing the essence of Spanish snacking culture.

metaData.Key Information: Our fine English crisps are made from local potatoes at Tyrrells Court Farm. We cook them by hand in small batches and we always leave the jackets on. Well, it’s only polite. Made with the finest potatoes, anointed with sea salt and that most cracking of spices. A harmonious union, indeed. Proud winners of 6 Great Taste Awards to date.
metaData.Preparation: A crunchy celebration of a time-honoured marriage: sea salt and that most cracking of spices black pepper.<
